design_philosophy.mood: Calm, structured, non-judgmental, warm, dignified, and supportive
design_philosophy.rationale: Coparenting mediation is high-stress. The UI acts as a digital sanctuary, reducing cognitive load with soft colors, generous spacing, and clear, single-focus steps. Sharp edges and high-contrast colors are avoided to prevent triggering anxiety.
rules: No sharp edges (use rounded corners everywhere).
One primary action per screen (Wizard flow).
De-saturated colors only. No high-vibrancy warnings.
Use optical alignment and generous negative space to let content breathe.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (Tailwind p-6, p-8, p-12). Content must breathe.

container_styles.cards: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-[#E8ECE9] shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(42,54,49,0.04)] p-8
container_styles.inputs: bg-[#F5F3E9] rounded-2xl border-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#849D8E] focus:bg-white transition-all
container_styles.buttons_primary: bg-[#849D8E] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#6C8576] transition-colors shadow-sm
container_styles.buttons_secondary: bg-[#F5F3E9] text-[#2A3631] rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#E8ECE9] transition-colors

animations.micro_interactions: Soft scale on button hover (scale 1.02). Progress bar fills smoothly over 1s.
animations.haptics_simulation: Visual reassurance upon task completion (e.g., gentle checkmark animation, soft green flash).

custom_instructions.Wizard_Progress: Use a subtle, segmented progress bar at the top of the screen. Colors: filled = Sage, empty = Light Sand.
custom_instructions.Priority_Ranking: Drag-and-drop cards should have a 'grab' handle icon. On drag, slightly elevate the card with a soft shadow.
custom_instructions.AI_Chat_Feedback: Display AI communication feedback in a soft Terracotta or Sage tinted card with an avatar/icon that feels empathetic, not robotic.
custom_instructions.Forms: Never use sharp square inputs. Use large touch targets (min height 48px). Use labels above inputs.

hero_background.description: Abstract background of flowing, curved shapes in sage and sand. Use as a subtle, low-opacity background behind the Welcome/Landing hero section.

zen_texture.description: Calming sand dune texture (black and white). Can be tinted with sage/sand overlay for dashboard background or resource center headers.

calm_water.description: Calm water ripples. Good for 'Personal Reflection' or 'Readiness Check' success screens.

floral_soft.description: Soft blurred floral background. Perfect for the 'App Orientation' or 'Child-Centered Goals' section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the entire app feels like a sanctuary. Avoid the standard 'Vercel SaaS' look.
Implement Google Auth + JWT seamlessly on the Landing/Welcome screen.
For the Wizard flow, ensure strict form validation but display errors gently (using the Warning/Soft Terracotta color, not harsh red).
Integrate a PDF export function for the 'Mediation Prep Summary' using a library like react-pdf or html2canvas + jspdf. Make the exported PDF match the calming branding.
The Dashboard should track progress across the modules (Child Goals, Issues, Priority Ranking, Comm Style, Readiness). Use Shadcn progress components customized with rounded edges and sage colors.
All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute for testing.
